nodes.title: Welcome to CAOCAP
nodes.subtitle: This is a canvas, not a file tree. Move slowly, look around, and start from intent.

nodes.title: Start With Intent
nodes.subtitle: Your first project will open with requirements, code, and preview nodes already arranged for you.
nodes.textContent:
A CAOCAP project starts with intent.

Write what the software should do, then let the workspace keep requirements, code, preview, and CoCaptain close together.

nodes.title: Enter Home
nodes.subtitle: Create your first spatial project from the Home workspace.

steps.label: Welcome to your spatial workspace! Try panning the canvas.
This is a requirements node. Pinch to zoom in on it.
When you're ready, tap the green arrow to enter Home.
